text: The sunset saw her sunrise's ship bloom into a twisted flower of flames.
A light from the flower's core shot into her own fuselage.
The sunrise saw her desperate shot clip the feathers of her eternal lover.
She ran through the vines. The violets appeared to spread for miles.
As the sunset gave chase, the flowers of her sins spread into the horizon.
There is no rest for the wicked. The day will always chase the night.
All we can do is watch their little game.
